title: Follow basic chemical safety rules
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Follow basic chemical safety rules demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work with chemicals

pcs.text: Confirm the activity to be undertaken with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the activity to be undertaken with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the activity to be undertaken with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm tools and equipment to be used with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm tools and equipment to be used with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm tools and equipment to be used with supervisor.

pcs.text: Use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit as directed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit as directed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit as directed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify functions of chemicals in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify functions of chemicals in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify functions of chemicals in the workplace.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work with chemicals

elements.title: Identify risks associated with chemicals

pcs.text: Identify and interpret chemical labels, safety signs, symbols and safety data sheets according to supervisors' instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret chemical labels, safety signs, symbols and safety data sheets according to supervisors' instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret chemical labels, safety signs, symbols and safety data sheets according to supervisors' instructions.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace and report to supervisor.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Control risks as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Control risks as directed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify risks associated with chemicals

elements.title: Follow chemical handling and storage rules

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate chemical store?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate chemical store.

pcs.text: Interpret and follow safe chemical handling, transport, and storage according to product label and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and follow safe chemical handling, transport, and storage according to product label and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and follow safe chemical handling, transport, and storage according to product label and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Observe instructions for maintenance and storage of PPE and application equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe instructions for maintenance and storage of PPE and application equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe instructions for maintenance and storage of PPE and application equipment.

pcs.text: Follow safety rules when working in areas where chemicals are stored
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow safety rules when working in areas where chemicals are stored?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow safety rules when working in areas where chemicals are stored.

pcs.text: Identify emergency procedures to follow in the event of an accident or spillage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify emergency procedures to follow in the event of an accident or spillage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify emergency procedures to follow in the event of an accident or spillage.

pcs.text: Record information as directed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record information as directed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record information as directed by supervisor.
